title: The Shooter
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Nickname}}
{{Youmay|the bodyguard assigned to Leia Organa Solo|the [[Vindoo Barvel|Imperial TIE Fighter ace]]}}
"'''The Shooter'''" was a nickname given to various bodyguards assigned to [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] in [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]].

During [[The Black Fleet Crisis]], Leia Solo was issued several bodyguards that changed often. Rather than learning the name of each new bodyguard, she instead nicknamed her two bodyguards based on their duties.

The Shooter received his nickname because he followed Leia wherever she went as a heavily armed rear guard, defending her against any attacks.

Leia refused to let the Shooter or his partner, "[[The Sniffer]]," accompany her outside the [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Imperial Palace]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Before the Storm]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Shield of Lies]]''
